finding: `team plan` detects a valid hot-file proposal-first gate but exposes no proposal input/creation route, while only `team start` accepts `--broker-proposal-file`. A Captain therefore cannot turn a blocked L5 plan into a ready plan without reverse-engineering a separate Broker proposal contract.
expectedBehavior: Team plan/validate must surface the required proposal schema and a copyable create/validate command, and may accept the same proposal file for readiness preview; start remains fail-closed until that validated proposal is supplied.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-TEAM-0083 delivery `31d5faa98` added proposal-first plan/start parity and paid three-provider L5 regression evidence.
